description: Fellow heroes who fought alongside each other to seal the Black Mage.
Comrades among the six heroes; Aran and Mercedes fought side by side in the final battle.
Heroes alliance members who share the bond of having sacrificed their futures to seal the Black Mage.
Both heroes who participated in the sealing ritual against the Black Mage.
Shade was Aran's closest companion, but Aran no longer remembers Shade exists due to his sacrifice.
Fellow heroes with a complex dynamic; Phantom flirts while Mercedes keeps him in check.
Heroes alliance members who respect each other's magical prowess.
Freud was the intellectual leader of the heroes; Phantom respected his brilliant mind.
Both powerful mages among the heroes who developed the sealing spell together.
Evan inherited Freud's spirit pact; Mir is his bonded dragon companion and lifelong partner.
Phantom loved Empress Aria deeply; her assassination by Lotus drove him to join the heroes.
Phantom despises Lotus for assassinating his beloved Aria on the Black Mage's orders.
Luminous delivered the final blow to seal the Black Mage but was corrupted by his dark magic in return.
Lania is Luminous's adoptive companion who helps him maintain his humanity against the encroaching darkness.
The six heroes united to seal the Black Mage, sacrificing centuries of their lives in the process.
Moonbeam is the fox spirit companion who stayed with Shade even after the world forgot him.
Shade sacrificed his existence to complete the seal on the Black Mage.
Mihile is the chief knight and personal guardian of Empress Cygnus, sworn to protect her.
Dawn Warriors serve as Cygnus's warriors, blessed by the sun spirit under her command.
Blaze Wizards serve Empress Cygnus as fire mages guided by the spirit Ignis.
Wind Archers are Cygnus Knights who draw power from the wind spirit.
Night Walkers serve Cygnus from the shadows, guided by the darkness spirit.
Thunder Breakers fight for Cygnus with lightning-charged martial arts.
Shinsoo is the divine bird who guides and protects Empress Cygnus, her eternal guardian.
Cygnus is the niece and successor of Empress Aria, inheriting the Maple throne.
Orchid was a loyal commander of the Black Mage who led the Black Wings in his absence.
Lotus served as a commander of the Black Mage, carrying out assassinations including Empress Aria.
Hilla pledged her soul to the Black Mage in exchange for immortality and necromantic power.
Magnus serves the Black Mage as a commander while pursuing his own ambitions of conquest in Grandis.
Arkarium is the serpent priest commander who has served the Black Mage since ancient times.
Will guards the dimensional gate for the Black Mage as one of his most cunning commanders.
Lucid was an elf who was corrupted and became a commander controlling the dream world for the Black Mage.
The Demon Slayer was once a commander but betrayed the Black Mage after discovering his family was murdered.
Damien was manipulated by the Black Mage's forces and became a commander seeking to destroy the World Tree.
Orchid and Lotus are twin siblings; Orchid's entire motivation revolves around saving her brother.
Orchid and Phantom are enemies due to Lotus assassinating Aria, though their relationship evolves over time.
Damien is the younger brother figure of the Demon Slayer, both from the same demon family.
Damien and Orchid cooperated as commanders, with Orchid manipulating Damien for her own goals.
The Demon Slayer and Demon Avenger share the same origin but chose different paths of power.
After betraying the Black Mage, the Demon Slayer joined the Resistance in Edelstein.
Gelimer kidnapped Xenon as a child and converted them into a cyborg weapon; Xenon seeks revenge.
Claudine of the Resistance helped Xenon escape from Gelimer's laboratory and regain their humanity.
Kaiser fights to liberate Grandis from Magnus's tyrannical conquest of the Nova homeworld.
Kaiser (Kyle) and Angelic Buster (Tear) are childhood friends who protect Grandis together.
Both Nova fighters allied against Magnus, though Cadena operates independently from the streets.
Eskalade is the ancient dragon spirit who granted Tear her Angelic Buster transformation powers.
Magnus destroyed Cadena's family and home, driving her vendetta from the slums of Savage Terminal.
Alpha and Beta are two halves of Zero, the Child of the Transcendent of Time, inseparable twins.
Rhinne is the Transcendent of Time and the mother figure of Zero (Alpha and Beta).
The Black Mage imprisoned Rhinne and split her child into two, trapping them in Mirror World.
The Black Mage imprisoned Rhinne, the Transcendent of Time, to seize control over time itself.
Illium fights against Darmoor, the Transcendent of Life from Grandis who seeks to subjugate the Flora.
Both Flora who oppose Darmoor's tyranny, though from different eras and factions.
Adele was betrayed by the High Flora under Darmoor's influence and now fights against his regime.
Hoyoung accidentally released the fiend Taotie and must now track and recapture it.
Dr. Y is the scientist who experimented on Kain, implanting the malice weapon within him.
Gri is the bell spirit companion who aids Lara in communicating with mountain spirits.
Lucid was once an elf who admired the heroes, especially Mercedes, before being corrupted into a commander.
Seren is connected to Darmoor as both are Transcendents of Grandis, though their alliance is complex.
Seren and Cygnus clash as representatives of Grandis and Maple World's opposing forces.
Jay is Kinesis's best friend from Seoul who helps him navigate between the modern world and Maple World.
Hayato and Kanna are companions from Zipangu who crossed into Maple World together.
Gelimer is the Black Wings' chief scientist who oppresses Edelstein, the Resistance's home.
Gelimer serves the Black Mage through the Black Wings but harbors his own megalomaniacal ambitions.
Both commanders of the Black Mage who compete for favor and power within the hierarchy.
Will and Arkarium have a tense relationship as competing commanders with different methods.
